name: Cauliflower with Ground Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ingredients by slicing the cauliflower into 1/4-inch thick slices.
2. Heat oil in a wok to smoking point, then add ground beef and onion. Stir fry until browned (about 3 minutes).
3. Add cauliflower, salt, soya sauce, and 3/4 cup of water. Cover the wok and cook for a full 10 minutes, lifting the cover occasionally to stir.
4. Mix the corn starch solution with water, then add it to the mixture and stir thoroughly.
NOTE: Pork or chicken may be substituted for ground beef.
